app.name: Siete Academy
app.tagline: We train you. Agencies hire you.

home.heroPitch: Siete has sent 4.2M professional emails across LatAm and works with 180+ active B2B clients. Now we're training the next generation of SDRs in 8 weeks: on-demand content, live sessions with our AEs, team exercises, and a real exam in front of our commercial team. Those who pass get placed.
expectList: Live sessions at the end of each module
Practical exam in front of Siete

modules.d: How SaaS, agencies and marketplaces make money. Pricing, ACV, ARR, funding, the metrics your customer actually watches.
From the theoretical buyer persona to an actionable ICP. Real intent signals, exclusions that save you hours.
Multichannel cadences, discovery, qualification frameworks, objection handling, follow-up that doesn't annoy.
The tools we use daily. Your first recorded cold call reviewed by a Siete AE.

home.finalTagline: Think you have what it takes? Prove it.

apply.title: Apply to Siete Academy
apply.subtitle: We want to know you before opening the door. Be specific and honest.
apply.name: Full name
apply.question1: Why do you want to work in sales?
apply.question2: Tell us about an achievement you're proud of
apply.question3: How many hours/week can you dedicate?
apply.video: Video URL (YouTube/Loom/public Drive) — 1 to 2 min pitching yourself
apply.success: Thanks! We'll review your application and get back to you.

student.title: My progress
student.noEnrollments: You are not enrolled in any cohort yet.
student.referSubtitle: Share Siete Academy with your network. Open the door for others too.
student.referralText: I'm training as an SDR at Siete Academy. If you know people hungry to sell, send them this:

calendar.title: Your program schedule
calendar.subtitle: Live sessions, module windows and recordings — all in one place.
calendar.empty: You don't have sessions scheduled yet. We'll notify you when your cohort opens.

account.title: Your profile
account.subtitle: Update how the rest of the program sees you.
account.name: Full name
account.photoHint: Paste the link to your photo. In prod we'll upload images directly.
account.emailHint: Your email is managed from your account (Google). It's not changed here.
account.passwordHint: Your password is managed from your Google account. If you need to change it, do it there and come back — no need to notify Siete.

teacher.feedbackPlaceholder: Be specific. Be honest. Help them improve.
teacher.attachmentHint: Upload to Drive/Dropbox/Loom and paste the link

teacherHome.title: Your program snapshot
teacherHome.subtitle: Who's progressing, who's stuck, how many deliveries are waiting. No fluff.

admin.courseHint: Edit modules, lessons, videos and handbooks.
admin.cohortsHint: Create cohorts, open/close modules, adjust dates.

adminCourse.subtitle: Add videos, handbooks and resources. Reorder modules and lessons. Changes propagate to every cohort automatically.
adminCourse.noModules: This course has no modules yet.
adminCourse.youtubeHint: Only the ID (e.g. dQw4w9WgXcQ), not the full URL.
adminCourse.confirmDelete: Delete this lesson? This cannot be undone.
adminCourse.addLessonHint: The ES title is copied to EN/PT by default — edit afterwards.
adminCourse.resourcesEmpty: No support material yet. Paste links to slides, PDFs, papers or extra recordings.
adminCourse.resourceHint: Paste the public link (Drive/Dropbox/Loom). Reference material — doesn't count toward student progress.
adminCourse.assessmentsEmpty: No assessments yet. Create an MCQ, written deliverable, cold-call video, etc.
adminCourse.configHint: Depends on the type. MCQ needs questions + correct_answers. A written deliverable needs a prompt. Use the placeholder as guidance.
adminCourse.confirmDeleteAssessment: Delete this assessment? Past submissions are not erased.

footer.tagline: Siete · B2B prospecting agency from LatAm
footer.motto: Built for people who actually sell.

certificate.title: Your certificate
certificate.empty: You don't have a certificate yet. Finish every module of your cohort.

recruiter.title: Available talent
recruiter.subtitle: Graduates cleared by Siete, ready to meet.
recruiter.interviewBody:
Hi {{name}},

I came across your profile through Siete Academy and I was really impressed with how you carried yourself and the results you showed during the program.

I'd love to schedule an interview to learn more about you. Are you available this week?

Looking forward to hearing from you.

Best,
